title: punc_norm produces just a period for whitespace-only input
body: punc_norm(text) in src/chatterbox/tts.py treats a string of only spaces as non-empty, so after stripping and appending a full stop it hands the model a lone '.' to synthesize instead of raising a clear input error.

title: No way to disable watermarking for batch generation
body: ChatterboxTTS always applies perth watermarking to generated audio in tts.py with no flag to skip it, which adds noticeable latency when generating large batches for internal evaluation.

title: gradio_tts_app.py doesn't validate reference audio length
body: Uploading a very short (under 1 second) audio prompt in gradio_tts_app.py isn't rejected before being passed to VoiceEncoder, which leads to a confusing tensor shape error deep inside the s3gen pipeline instead of a friendly message.

title: No documented offline mode for local checkpoints
body: tts.py hardcodes REPO_ID = 'ResembleAI/chatterbox' and downloads weights via hf_hub_download on first use; there's no documented way to point ChatterboxTTS at a checkpoint directory already on disk for offline environments.
